# Options Premium Tracker - Copilot Instructions

This is a React TypeScript application with Node.js/Express backend for tracking real-time options premium data for Indian stocks.

## Project Structure
- Frontend: React + TypeScript + Vite
- Backend: Node.js + Express + TypeScript + WebSockets
- Styling: Custom CSS with modern design patterns

## Key Features
- Real-time options premium tracking for top 5 Indian stocks
- WebSocket connection for live data updates
- Put options data with Greeks (Delta, Gamma, Theta, Vega)
- Sortable and filterable options table
- Responsive design with beautiful UI

## Code Patterns
- Use TypeScript interfaces for type safety
- Implement proper error handling for API calls
- Follow React hooks patterns for state management
- Use modern CSS with gradients and glassmorphism effects
- Implement real-time data updates via WebSockets

## Indian Stock Market Context
- Focus on NSE (National Stock Exchange) listed stocks
- Use INR (₹) currency formatting
- Consider Indian trading hours and market conventions
- Top stocks: RELIANCE, TCS, HDFCBANK, INFY, ICICIBANK
